entries.rationale: Dependency trees are huge; indexing wastes RAM and context.
Rust build output is large and churns constantly.
Bundled output is usually generated and not worth indexing.
Build directories are often large generated artifacts.
Python bytecode caches are noisy for the model.
Virtualenvs duplicate site-packages and bloat context.
HTML coverage reports are huge and rarely edited by hand.
Git internals are almost never useful in agent context.
